commands.name: chat
commands.description: Interactive terminal chatbot backed by the project orchestrator with a graceful fallback mode.

options.description: Exit immediately if the full RAG stack can't be loaded (skip lightweight fallback).
Stream model output tokens when the active adapter supports streaming.
Persist an additional ad-hoc document into the knowledge base before chatting.

examples: python cli/chat.py --add-doc 'Acme launched a new product in 2024.'

metadata.notes: Extend this file when new CLI tools are added so documentation stays in sync.
